# frostmoln_vpc (Resource)

Manages a VPC in the Frostmoln Cloud Platform.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr` (String) The CIDR block for the VPC.
- `name` (String) The name of the VPC.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the VPC.
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags for the VPC.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the VPC.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default VPC.
- `status` (String) The status of the VPC.
- `subnet_count` (Number) The number of subnets in the VPC.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp.
